Aether Games

Website

Aether Games is an innovative transmedia studio that creates immersive entertainment experiences using high-fantasy narratives for both web2 and web3 audiences.

Octavia

Website

Octavia is the #1 AI Crypto assistant, designed to make community management, blockchain research and trading easier than ever.

Learn more
Completed

KASU

Website

KASU is a decentralised platform that bridges DeFi Liquidity Providers and Real World Yield Providers.

Learn more
Completed

Virtual Version

Website

Virtual Versions is an advanced identity solution allowing users to create and own realistic avatars, centralizing their digital presence.

Learn more
Completed

Patex

Website

Patex is the first blockchain ecosystem targeting Latin America, a region with 670M+ people and a $5.5 trillion GDP Brasil account.

Learn more
Completed

DEX Check

Website

DexCheck offers crypto trading support across 10+ blockchains like Ethereum and BSC, featuring Telegram bots and AI-powered analytics.

Learn more
Completed

Kewl

Website

Kewl is a multichain Web3 Gaming ecosystem for gamers to discover, play blockchain games, trade their gaming assets and earn rewards.

Learn more
Completed

Orbofi

Website

Orbofi is the ultimate AI-generated content layer and AI asset factory and distribution platform for web3, games, and the metaverse.

Learn more
Completed

ChainGPT

Website

ChainGPT is an advanced AI model explicitly designed for Blockchain Technology and Crypto-related topics. Among its unique features: a reliable source of information, no-code smart contract generator, smart-contract auditor, etc.

Learn more
Completed

GameSwift

Website

GameSwift is a modular blockchain network that seamlessly integrates with gaming, offering a smooth, nearly invisible blockchain experience.

Learn more
Completed

Exverse

Website

Exverse is a free-to-play game where players earn in-game cryptocurrency for their performance and contribution, with enhanced earnings for NFT holders.

Learn more
Completed

Openfabric

Website

Openfabric is a decentralized AI platform fostering collaboration among AI innovators, data providers, and businesses for creating intelligent algorithms and services.

Learn more

Follow us

Legal Note: Participants/Citizens from the following countries are strictly excluded/not allowed from the crowdfundng platform: Afghanistan, Barbados, Burkina Faso, Cambodia, Cayman Islands, North Korea, Haiti, Iran, Jamaica, Jordan, Mali, Morocco, Myanmar, Nicaragua, Pakistan, Panama, Philippines, Senegal, Sudan, Syria, Trinidad and Tobago, Uganda, Vanuatu, Yemen, Zimbabwe, and Russian Federation (Russia, Crimea, Belarus, Luhansk, Donetsk etc.) (collectively referred to as the "Prohibited Jurisdictions") according to the Terms Of Services.

This webpage and any contents published on this website shall not constitute investment advice, financial advice, trading advice, or any other kind of advice, and you should not treat any of the website's content as such. You alone assume the sole responsibility of evaluating the merits and risks associated with using any information or other content on this website before making any decisions based on such information.

You understand that the crypto market is characterized by high volatility, and you should be aware of the concrete possibility of losing the entirety of the funds you allocated in the crypto market. You should refrain from using funds you can't afford to lose when purchasing cryptocurrencies and other digital tokens.

You are aware and understand that this webpage enables you to invest in various projects that can be found here by purchasing tokens. You are aware and understand that by conducting the purchase of token/tokens (investing), you are purchasing the tokens from the chosen project, not from UAB GAINS Associates and that UAB GAINS Associates is in no way responsible for the features of such tokens, as well as for the final outcome of such purchase; all and any legal claims and disputes regarding project tokens purchased (invested in) by you while using the System shall occur between the project(s) and you and shall not involve UAB GAINS Associates, whose role is limited to creating the conditions for this relationship to take place.

Kindly Note: Please be aware of phishing sites and always make sure you are visiting the official app.gains-associates.com website when entering sensitive data.

UAB GAINS Associates, company no. 306072760, operates the Service, formally registered as a Virtual currency exchange operator & Deposit virtual currency exchange operator in the Republic of Lithuania.
